programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: This is an incredibly dated 1970s four-bed home on an elevated block with a steep driveway. This lovely family with two kids are preparing to downsize, but they seem slightly clueless as to why their house won't sell, and it's scaring off the buyers. It's been on the market for 14 months with a hopeless agent that they have replaced. They'll need to lower their expectations as they're currently asking well over the suburb average, even before the team renovates.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh is tackling the most difficult plot the team have ever faced. Chris Garlick lost his hands and feet to sepsis just 22 months before and is moved to tears by the fabulous family garden.

programme.title: Country House Rescue
programme.desc: Ruth Watson attempting to help one of the most historically important houses yet. Kentchurch Court in Herefordshire has been home to the Scudamores for over 1000 years, handed down through the family since 1058.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Without a Trace
programme.desc: Heart-wrenching news awaits a woman discovered as a newborn baby on the steps of a tower block. Seventy years after he was left opposite an underground station, can DNA help one man find his roots?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Builder Chris Knierem wants to create an environmentally sustainable eco-house in the heart of Sydney's inner west. He manages to buy one of the last, original vacant blocks of land in Forest Lodge and while living in the house next-door, designs, and will now build, his longed for 'green' home. Despite the narrow block and tricky access, the house will feature thermal mass heating below the slab, eradicating heating bills, an underground water tank, vertical gardens, louvres for cooling and a roof-top garden with solar panels. He's hoping this green space above will encourage the return of bird life to the city and that his new home will become a benchmark for contemporary green design.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil help civil partners Jo and Ally, who are planning a family and want to be in their own home before two becomes three. Meanwhile, Liverpudlian Jennifer Dean has 209,000 pounds for a two-bedroom period property.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Sydney doctors Meredith and Mathew Bayfield are building a new family homestead on their 1000-acre merino sheep station in Ilford, on the NSW central tablelands. They plan to spend half their time here. The new house will have two pavilions linked by a glass walkway, made from local and reclaimed materials and wool derived products like wool insulation. The house will sit on the highest, most exposed spot on their land and while this will afford them wonderful district views, it will also challenge them in unexpected ways. As will the design, which is reworked several times on the run.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with young couple Wendy and Simon, who were desperate to find their first home in Derby, and their oldest ever househunters Margot and Henry, in Berkshire. After nearly 50 years in the same home, Margot and Henry were looking for something trendy and modern. But did Henry really want to move home?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Sydney doctors Meredith and Mathew Bayfield are building a new family homestead on their 1000-acre merino sheep station in Ilford, on the NSW central tablelands. They plan to spend half their time here. The new house will have two pavilions linked by a glass walkway, made from local and reclaimed materials and wool derived products like wool insulation. The house will sit on the highest, most exposed spot on their land and while this will afford them wonderful district views, it will also challenge them in unexpected ways. As will the design, which is reworked several times on the run.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Married in 1987, Daniela and Niran have spent 25 years saving to build their dream home together. They're using the site of their old house - a battelaxe block in affluent, leafy Hunters Hill. Entry is via a long, narrow driveway, lined with trees deemed significant, so building access proves challenging and expensive. Daniela and Niran face both the challenges and the house design bravely, using a highly unusual mix of techniques and materials. Surrounded by traditional sandstone and federation homes, theirs will stand out for its fresh take on modernist architecture - one which combines their love of natural materials, organic textures and rectilinear architecture. It promises to be a fascinating marriage of styles.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: This is the ultimate Aussie grand design as artists Andrew and Dianne farewell the heat of Arnhem Land in the Northern Territory, where they manage an Aborignal art gallery, to start a new life in a polar opposite location in Bass Strait. Their new home will sit on the wild and windy west coast of King Island, a remote location frequently lashed by the Roaring Forties. King Island isn't known for its eclectic architecture, so the house will stand apart for its unique design in the shape of a whale's tail. Overlooking the sea, it's a house that will truly embrace its location while reflecting the couple's love of the island. This is the journey of Andrew and Dianne establishing their new spiritual home, if it doesn't get blown away.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: Heart Eyes
programme.desc: A masked maniac with glowing red eyes returns each Valentine's Day to kill couples. An ad exec and her romantic colleague become targets and vow to stop the terror.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: This is the remarkable story of the Agojie, the all-female unit of warriors who protected the African Kingdom of Dahomey in the 1800s with skills and a fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: And Mrs
programme.desc: When a reluctant bride-to-be's fiance drops dead, she insists on marrying him anyway, vowing to overcome public opinion, the law of the land, and her loved one's objections.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A young land clerk is summoned to a vampire's castle, while his wife falls under the spell of a dark force in her dreams, leading to a perilous journey into the unknown.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: Nobody is ready for the mayhem and surprises that ensue when six of the worst youngsters disrupt the town's yearly Christmas performance.

programme.title: Jeanne Du Barry
programme.desc: The life of Jeanne Becu, who was born as the illegitimate daughter of a seamstress in 1743 and went on to rise through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Mr Burton
programme.desc: The true story of the wild school boy Rich Jenkins, son of a boozy miner, and the English teacher who recognised his talent, Philip Burton.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: A solitary writer adopts her late friend's Great Dane and, through their bond, starts to come to terms with her past and reconnect with her creative self.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: How To Lose A Popularity Contest
programme.desc: A rebellious student and a perfectionist overachiever form an unlikely alliance in the race for student body president, discovering unexpected feelings as competition heats up.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer Or Fall
programme.desc: Remi and Barnes, two very different teenagers, meet by chance in the winter of their senior year, then spend four days together over the course of a year that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
programme.desc: As college tests their relationship, freshman quarterback Drayton and promising dancer Dallas navigate love and distance while searching for who they're meant to be. As the pressures of ambition, recovery, and growing independence mount, the couple struggles to hold on.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: To stay in the country, a gay man offers to fund his friend's IVF if she marries him. Chaos ensues when his grandmother plans a lavish Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Firebrand
programme.desc: Katherine Parr, Henry VIII's sixth wife, becomes regent while he battles abroad. When he returns sick and paranoid, she must fight for her survival.

programme.title: Nick Cave's Veiled World
programme.desc: Through reflections from close collaborators & noted artists, this documentary explores Nick Cave's creative world, his influence & the shadowy, mythic stories behind his music.

programme.title: Flight 149: Hostage of War
programme.desc: In 1990, Iraq takes the world by surprise and invades Kuwait. BA Flight 149 from London lands in Kuwait for a scheduled stop with men, women and children aboard. The plane never reaches its final destination.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: Two British police officers Thomas Wilkin and Geoffrey Morton in their hunt for charismatic poet and Zionist freedom fighter Avraham Stern, who was plotting to evict British authorities.

programme.title: Kerouac's Road: The Beat of a Nation
programme.desc: A modern exploration of On the Road, as celebrities and travellers reflect on real experiences in a digital world, mirroring Kerouac's search for genuine connection.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high as producer Lorne Michaels and a ferocious troupe of young comedians and writers prepare for the first broadcast of "Saturday Night Live" on Oct. 11, 1975.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than thirty years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. When he finds himself training a detachment of Top Gun graduates for a specialised mission the likes of which no living pilot has ever seen, Maverick encounters Lt. Bradley Bradshaw, call sign: "Rooster", the son of Maverick's late friend and Radar Intercept Officer Lt. Nick Bradshaw, aka "Goose". Facing an uncertain future and confronting the ghosts of his past, Maverick is drawn into a confrontation with his own deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who will be chosen to fly it.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
programme.desc: Constance Bonacieux is kidnapped before D'Artagnan's very eyes. The young musketeer, aided by Athos, Porthos and Aramis, is forced to join the mysterious Milady de Winter.

programme.title: Novocaine No Pain
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage as he fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: Unveils the decisive moment that forever changed media coverage and continues to impact live news today. Set during the 1972 Munich Summer Olympics, an American Sports broadcasting team must quickly adapt from sports reporting to live coverage of the Israeli athletes taken hostage.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: Thrown together under tragic circumstances, three generations of women from the same family are forced to learn to live together on a small rural chicken farm in New Jersey.

programme.title: Midas Man
programme.desc: On Thursday 9 November 1961, a man named Brian descended the stairs to a cellar in Liverpool and changed the world forever.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Sacramento
programme.desc: Free-spirited Rickey, clinging to his Peter Pan ways, convinces his settled friend Glenn to pause domestic life for an unplanned road trip across California.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight
programme.desc: Top assassins battle in a brutal underground tournament, but a rogue crew aims to survive, outsmart the killers, and bring down the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A young land clerk is summoned to a vampire's castle, while his wife falls under the spell of a dark force in her dreams, leading to a perilous journey into the unknown.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: A soldier searches for his missing wife, infiltrating a facility he believes is tied to trafficking, only to find it's a futuristic park blurring reality and illusion.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage's novels are filled with ancient tombs and daring adventures, but that doesn't mean she's prepared for them in real life. When she is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire to locate a legendary lost city, Loretta's handsome cover model, Alan, sets off on a heroic but hapless rescue mission. Thrust into an epic thrill-ride through the jungle, the unlikely pair must work together to survive the elements, and survive each other, to find the city's fabled treasure before it's lost forever.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Rewriting Trump
programme.desc: Filmed over a year, exploring the story of Trump's return to power through the lens of biographer and New York Times best-selling author, Michael Wolff.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Greece
programme.desc: France. When childhood friends Magalie and Blandine cross paths after many years, they decide to finally take their dream vacation to Greece. (Subtitles)

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to transform his appearance. However, his dream face quickly becomes a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she confronts the possibility of finding love and happiness in the face of mental illness.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer Or Fall
programme.desc: Remi and Barnes, two very different teenagers, meet by chance in the winter of their senior year, then spend four days together over the course of a year that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother's first date in years turns terrifying when she receives anonymous threats during dinner, making her question if her charming date is behind the harassment.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Zora Bennett leads a team to a deadly island lab to retrieve dinosaur DNA with life-saving potential, but they uncover a shocking secret buried for decades.

programme.title: High Ground
programme.desc: When a mysterious prisoner lands in his jail, a border town sheriff faces the wrath of a brutal cartel.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: This is the story of Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the "Marsh Girl" haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she confronts the possibility of finding love and happiness in the face of mental illness.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Winnfield and Vincent Vega are two hitmen out to retrieve a suitcase stolen from their employer, mob boss Marcellus Wallace. Wallace has also asked Vincent to take his wife Mia out a few days later when Wallace himself will be out of town. Butch Coolidge is an ageing boxer who is paid by Wallace to lose his next fight. Honey Bunny and Pumpkin are a couple of young lovers and small time thieves who decide they need a change of venue. The lives of these seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wildly entertaining and exhilarating motion picture adventure that both thrills and amuses.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Having lost his memory and the one person he loved, Bourne is forced to hunt down his past in order to find a future. Travelling from Moscow, Paris and London to Tangier and New York City, he continues his quest to find the real Jason Bourne, all the while trying to out-manoeuvre the scores of cops, federal officers and Interpol agents who have him in their sights.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Growing up the best of friends, they share the strong bond of free-spirited youth and good-natured rivalry. But the truth will ultimately set them at odds, as one becomes the ruler of the most powerful empire on earth, the other the chosen leader of his people. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Les Miserables (2012)
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of 19th-century France, this is the enthralling story of broken dreams and unrequited love, passion, sacrifice and redemption, and a timeless testament to the survival of the human spirit. Ex-prisoner Jean Valjean is hunted for decades by the ruthless policeman Javert after he breaks parole. When Valjean agrees to care for factory worker Fantine's young daughter, Cosette, their lives change forever.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Andrew Neyman is an ambitious young jazz drummer, single-minded in his pursuit to rise to the top of his elite east coast music conservatory. Plagued by the failed writing career of his father, Andrew hungers day and night to become one of the greats. Terence Fletcher, an instructor equally known for his teaching talents as for his terrifying methods, leads the top jazz ensemble in the school. Fletcher discovers Andrew and transfers the aspiring drummer into his band, forever changing the young man's life. Andrew's passion to achieve perfection quickly spirals into obsession, as his ruthless teacher continues to push him to the brink of both his ability and his sanity.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: After barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine. Indy must save the children and avoid becoming a slave himself to the evil Thuggee cult.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: As Good as it Gets
programme.desc: An antisocial writer, a single mother, and a gay artist become unlikely friends in this comedy-drama.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the enigmatic and opportunistic businessman Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust. This emotional film chronicles the trials and triumphs of one man who made a difference, and the tribulations of those who survived one of the darkest chapters in human history because of his actions.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The year is 1939, Indiana Jones and museum curator Marcus Brody venture to Italy in search of Dr Henry Jones, Indy's father. The rescue mission turns into a race to find the Holy Grail before the Nazi's. With Dr Jones's diary as a vital key and the map with no names as a guide, Indiana once again finds himself in another death defying adventure of pure excitement.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Based on the Valiant Comics series, Bloodshot, an ex-killer for the mob and slain soldier, is re-animated with superpowers.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement (Billy Bob Thornton) and a professional assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol Policeman John Cale has just been denied his dream job with the Secret Service of protecting President James Sawyer. Not wanting to let down his little girl with the news, he takes her on a tour of the White House, during which the complex is overtaken by a heavily armed paramilitary group. Now, with the nation's government falling into chaos and time running out, it's up to Cale to save the president, his daughter, and the country.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: On the turbo-charged streets of Los Angeles, every night is a championship race. With nitro-boosted fury, Dominic Toretto rules the road, turning all his challengers into dust. He and his rival, Johnny Tran, are the boldest, the baddest, and the best, but now there's new rage on the road. They know he's tough, they know he's fast, but what they don't know is that he's a speed demon detective with enough drive and determination to come out the winner.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent. Suddenly, everyone on both sides of the law wants them dead, and their only hope is to trust each other.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman is caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home. Now a hardworking life insurance salesman and a caring family man, the former police officer, Michael MacCauley, has taken the commuter rail to New York for the past ten years. But, unexpectedly, things will take a turn for the worse, when on one of his daily journeys, the cryptic passenger, Joanna, makes Michael a generous and tempting offer to locate a single commuter or face grave consequences. Is this a sick joke, or is this indeed a serious situation? As Michael races against the clock to solve this wicked conundrum, everyone aboard is a suspect, in a deal where there's definitely more than meets the eye. Can he decide in time who's the one?

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Phillip Noyce directs Angelina Jolie as Evelyn Salt, a CIA officer who swore an oath to duty, honour and country. When she is accused by a defector of being a Russian sleeper spy, Salt goes on the run to clear her name and ultimately prove her loyalty. Using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative, she must elude capture and protect her family or the world's most powerful forces will erase any trace of her existence. With her superiors convinced she's out to assassinate the president, she also must race the clock to learn the identity of the real traitor.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: The world's hunger for extreme sports and reality competitions has grown into reality TV bloodlust. Now, the most extreme racing competition has emerged and its contestants are murderous prisoners. The rules of the Death Race are simple: win five events and you're set free. Lose and you're road kill splashed across the Internet.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Novocaine No Pain
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage as he fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: It's the nitro-fuelled answer to the question: how fast do you like it? Now an ex-cop on the run, Brian O'Connor hooks into outlaw street-racing. When the Feds strong-arm him back, O'Connor's no rules, win-or-die skills are unleashed against an international drug lord. With his velocity-addicted buddy riding shotgun, and a drop-dead-gorgeous undercover agent dialling up the heat, this film accelerates the action into a desperate race for survival, justice and mind-blowing, jaw-dropping speed.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: From the Central Asian mountains to the deserts of Egypt, through the crowded streets of Paris, to beneath the ice cap of the North Pole, the elite team of operatives known as GI Joe journey on a nonstop adventure, as they use the latest in next-generation spy technology and military equipment to fight the duplicitous arms dealer Destro, and the growing threat of the mysterious Cobra organisation from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore reunite again since starring in THE WEDDING SINGER. Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss so every night all memory of her day is erased. But a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: After George is downsized from his financial firm and Linda's depressing documentary is cancelled, they can no longer afford their overpriced 'micro-loft' in New York. They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: When a wounded Christian Grey tried to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore reunite again since starring in THE WEDDING SINGER. Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss so every night all memory of her day is erased. But a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: After George is downsized from his financial firm and Linda's depressing documentary is cancelled, they can no longer afford their overpriced 'micro-loft' in New York. They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A hilarious romantic comedy about men, women, and everything that can go wrong between them. Sparks fly when brilliant divorce attorney Miles Massey meets his match in the beautiful but ruthless Marylin Rexroth.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark Darcy, Bridget Jones's "happily ever after" hasn't quite gone according to plan. Fortysomething and single again, she decides to focus on her job as top news producer and surround herself with old friends and new. For once, Bridget has everything completely under control. What could possibly go wrong? Then her love life takes a turn and Bridget meets a dashing American named Jack, the suitor who is everything Mr. Darcy is not. In an unlikely twist she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch she can only be fifty percent sure of the identity of her baby's father.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she'll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you'll go for someone you love.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A hilarious romantic comedy about men, women, and everything that can go wrong between them. Sparks fly when brilliant divorce attorney Miles Massey meets his match in the beautiful but ruthless Marylin Rexroth.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley Valentine, a wisecracking, completely unpredictable English housewife who proves it's never too late to recapture your dreams. Bored with her suburban life, Shirley takes a chance on adventure when her friend invites her on a vacation to Greece. Within no time she's back to her rebellious teenage roots, saying yes to a wild fling with a handsome rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark Darcy, Bridget Jones's "happily ever after" hasn't quite gone according to plan. Fortysomething and single again, she decides to focus on her job as top news producer and surround herself with old friends and new. For once, Bridget has everything completely under control. What could possibly go wrong? Then her love life takes a turn and Bridget meets a dashing American named Jack, the suitor who is everything Mr. Darcy is not. In an unlikely twist she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch she can only be fifty percent sure of the identity of her baby's father.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: Pride And Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: Mr Bennet is an English gentleman living in Hertfordshire with his overbearing wife and five daughters; the beautiful Jane, the clever Elizabeth, the bookish Mary, the immature Kitty and the wild Lydia. Unfortunately for the Bennet's, if Mr Bennet dies their house will be inherited by a distant cousin whom they have never met, so the family's future happiness and security is dependent on the daughters making good marriages. Life is uneventful until the arrival in the neighbourhood of the rich gentleman Mr Bingley, who rents a large house so he can spend the summer in the country. Mr Bingley brings with him his two sisters and the dashing but proud Mr Darcy. Love is soon in the air for one of the Bennet sisters, while another may have jumped to a hasty prejudgment. For the Bennet sisters many trials and tribulations stand between them and their happiness, including class, gossip and scandal.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Struggling to make sense of life after college, seven friends trade lovers, secrets, and yada-yadas at their favourite college hang-out, until a final crisis involving dysfunctional party girl, Jules, forces them out of the nest.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment in the community and win over a handsome local.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family's chauffeur falls in love with one of their sons.

programme.title: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: Rachel is a generous and loyal pal to her engaged best friend, Darcy. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of Dex, the guy she's had a crush on since law school - who happens to be Darcy's fiance. In the frantic weeks leading up to Darcy's wedding, Rachel finds herself caught between her long-time friendship with Darcy and the prospect of losing the love of her life.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Struggling to make sense of life after college, seven friends trade lovers, secrets, and yada-yadas at their favourite college hang-out, until a final crisis involving dysfunctional party girl, Jules, forces them out of the nest.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: An old-school anchorman who quit his longtime evening newscast because of its new, gossipy ways is recruited by a hotshot producer who is looking to revive a failing morning show.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family's chauffeur falls in love with one of their sons.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: Gwen and Eddie are 'America's Sweethearts' - the country's favourite couple, on-screen and off, but when their very public romance turns into a very private break-up, only veteran press agent Lee and Gwen's assistant, Kiki, can help Gwen and Eddie show some love while they promote their last film together. The press junket is in a resort hotel miles from anywhere, and while Lee and Kiki frantically try to keep the media away from the real story - and keep Gwen and Eddie from revealing their secret - Kiki finds something entirely unexpected.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way. From the director of Fast Times at Ridgemont High comes a 'teenagers save the world' comedy based loosely on Jane Austin's Emma, that elevated Alicia Silverstone from that Aerosmith girl to a star in the making.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiance, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up, Fritz doesn't seem to care. Once Gray breaks through Fritz's defences, however, she finally sees why her fiance thought so highly of him. As they spend more time together, Gray learns that her chances for love have not died out with her fiance. But when some surprise guests show up on their doorstep, it'll take the love of all of her new friends to help Gray learn that life may be messy, but love is messier.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon stars as a young man terrified of marriage and the adult responsibility that goes along with it. Elizabeth McGovern stars as his wife Kristy. Together Jake and Kristy face nearly every terror of young adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance becomes the prime suspect. Successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: A burgeoning relationship between two very different women in 1950s New York. One, a girl in her 20s working in a department store who dreams of a more fulfilling life, and the other, a wife trapped in a loveless, moneyed marriage, desperate to break free.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Mila Kunis star as best friends who are both coming out of disastrous relationships. They decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact vowing to stop the casual sex if either become emotionally attached. While the set-up works at first, soon the two friends fall in love and must re-evaluate what they mean to each other.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon stars as a young man terrified of marriage and the adult responsibility that goes along with it. Elizabeth McGovern stars as his wife Kristy. Together Jake and Kristy face nearly every terror of young adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Will To Kill
programme.desc: Ex-prosecutor Hailey Dean becomes a marriage counsellor and therapist. But, she gets caught up in a missing case and tries to solve the mystery surrounded by it to uncover the whole truth.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie must learn the ropes of instant parenthood when they bring in three foster children. Inspired by a true story, discover this must-see family comedy from the creators of Daddy's Home.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: April, 1945. As the Allies make their final push in the European Theatre, a battle-hardened army sergeant named Wardaddy commands a Sherman tank and her five-man crew on a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Outnumbered and out-gunned, and with a rookie soldier thrust into their platoon, Wardaddy and his men face overwhelming odds in their heroic attempts to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the enigmatic and opportunistic businessman Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust. This emotional film chronicles the trials and triumphs of one man who made a difference, and the tribulations of those who survived one of the darkest chapters in human history because of his actions.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Instant Family

programme.title: Mary Queen of Scots
programme.desc: A historical drama about the life of the Scottish monarch, Mary Stuart, and her contentious rivalry with her cousin, Elizabeth I. Upon the death of her husband, the King of France, 18-year-old Mary returns to her native Scotland to reclaim her rightful place on the English throne, thereby threatening the reign of Elizabeth I. Both powerful women in a world dominated by men, Mary and Elizabeth vie against each other for love, authority and influence as they each seek to fortify their respective thrones.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: The true saga of Anna Nicole Smith, whose youthful optimistic dreams of fame and fortune turn darkly tragic.

programme.title: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: Mari Gilbert's search for her missing daughter, Shannan, uncovers the work of a serial killer on Long Island.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: John Dillinger, a charismatic and elusive bank robber, is marked by the FBI as America's first 'Public Enemy No.1' and Billie Frechette is the only woman capable of capturing his heart. Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: The true saga of Anna Nicole Smith, whose youthful optimistic dreams of fame and fortune turn darkly tragic.

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 1
programme.desc: Joe, a self-diagnosed nymphomaniac, is discovered badly beaten in an alley by an older bachelor who takes her into his home.

programme.title: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: Mari Gilbert's search for her missing daughter, Shannan, uncovers the work of a serial killer on Long Island.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Minority Report

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals continue to baffle police by pulling off perfectly executed bank robberies. They are in and out like clockwork, leaving no evidence behind and laying low in between heists. But when they attempt to pull off one last job with more money at stake than ever before, the crew may find their plans interrupted by a hardened detective who is hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Gerry Conlon is one of four men coerced into signing false confessions for the IRA bombing of the Guildford pub that killed five people. His father is also unjustly charged and imprisoned with his son. Gerry spends 14 years in prison trying to prove his innocence and clear his family's name with the help of a British lawyer. Adapted from Conlon's autobiography Proved Innocent.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals continue to baffle police by pulling off perfectly executed bank robberies. They are in and out like clockwork, leaving no evidence behind and laying low in between heists. But when they attempt to pull off one last job with more money at stake than ever before, the crew may find their plans interrupted by a hardened detective who is hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: A young Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, miles from home. He is eventually adopted by an Australian couple, but years later he sets out to find his lost family.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When D.C. Reporter Cal McCaffrey is assigned to investigate the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures. In a town of spin-doctors and wealthy power brokers, he will discover one truth: when fortunes are at stake, no one's integrity, love or life is safe.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Set in the south two years before the Civil War, a freed slave is on a mission to rescue his wife from the notorious Calvin Candie, the proprietor of Candyland, an infamous and brutal plantation.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.
