He goes eyeball to eyeball with a man-eating shark, stakes out the Miami Dolphins and woos and wows the ladies. Whether he's undercover, under fire or underwater, he always gets his man or beast.

programme.title: Balls of Fury
programme.desc: Watch the balls fly in this hilarious action-packed comedy. When former professional table tennis phenomenon Randy Daytona is recruited by FBI agent Rodriguez for a mission in the unsanctioned, underground and utterly unhinged world of extreme table tennis, he's determined to bounce back to his former glory and smoke out his father's killer, the arch-fiend Feng. But with danger coming at him from every angle, will Randy be able to keep his eye on the balls?

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale and director Terri Flores, ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilisation. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide, who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Based on the Valiant Comics series, Bloodshot, an ex-killer for the mob and slain soldier, is re-animated with superpowers.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent. Suddenly, everyone on both sides of the law wants them dead, and their only hope is to trust each other.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: Mysterious and wild-eyed, a new security guard for a cash truck company surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who he is and where he came from. Soon, the marksman's ultimate motive becomes clear as he takes dramatic and irrevocable steps to settle a score.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Survivors try to uncover the truth behind the evil Umbrella Corp while battling bloodthirsty zombies in the wastelands of Raccoon City.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: A harrowing war drama where two Black Hawk helicopters are shot down over Mogadishu, trapping an elite team of American soldiers in a 15-hour firefight as they try to recover their fallen comrades.

programme.title: Dead Again in Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze was only a teenage stunt biker when he sold his soul to the devil. Years later, Johnny is a world renowned daredevil by day, but at night, he becomes the Ghost Rider of Marvel Comics legend. The devil's bounty hunter, he is charged with finding evil souls on earth and bringing them to hell. But when a twist of fate brings Johnny's long-lost love back into his life, Johnny realises he just might have a second chance at happiness - if he can beat the devil and win back his soul. To do so he'll have to defeat Blackheart, the devil's nemesis and wayward son, whose plot to take over his father's realm will bring hell on earth - unless Ghost Rider can stop him.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story. A group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol Policeman John Cale has just been denied his dream job with the Secret Service of protecting President James Sawyer. Not wanting to let down his little girl with the news, he takes her on a tour of the White House, during which the complex is overtaken by a heavily armed paramilitary group. Now, with the nation's government falling into chaos and time running out, it's up to Cale to save the president, his daughter, and the country.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: With the IMF disbanded, and Ethan out in the cold, the team now faces off against a network of highly skilled special agents, the Syndicate. These highly-trained operatives are hell-bent on creating a new world order through an escalating series of terrorist attacks. Ethan gathers his team and joins forces with disavowed British agent Ilsa Faust, who may or may not be a member of this rogue nation, as the group faces their most impossible mission yet.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Phillip Noyce directs Angelina Jolie as Evelyn Salt, a CIA officer who swore an oath to duty, honour and country. When she is accused by a defector of being a Russian sleeper spy, Salt goes on the run to clear her name and ultimately prove her loyalty. Using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative, she must elude capture and protect her family or the world's most powerful forces will erase any trace of her existence. With her superiors convinced she's out to assassinate the president, she also must race the clock to learn the identity of the real traitor.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O'Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder's diabolical plan.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Beck is a bounty hunter sent into the treacherous jungles of the Amazon to bring the rebellious Travis back to the States. When Beck and Travis reluctantly join forces to hunt down a priceless treasure, this unlikely team embarks on a pulse-pounding, nonstop thrill ride.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: If they hear you, they hunt you. In this terrifyingly suspenseful thriller, a family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee Abbott are determined to find a way to protect their children at all costs while they desperately search for a way to fight back.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a slacker by day, party animal by night, until he finds a serious career that's seriously cool: crime-fighting action hero. As the Green Hornet, he teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take down LA's underworld.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned and homeless, an ex-Special Forces soldier returns home a damaged man, struggling to find justice in a world saturated with violence in this gritty, explosive story about London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When convicted street racer Sean Boswell tries to start a new life on the other side of the world, his obsession with racing sets him on a collision course with the Japanese underworld. To survive, he will have to master drifting - a new style of racing where tricked-out cars slide through hairpin turns, defying gravity and death for the ultimate road rush.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons' all-consuming evil.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: Mysterious and wild-eyed, a new security guard for a cash truck company surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who he is and where he came from. Soon, the marksman's ultimate motive becomes clear as he takes dramatic and irrevocable steps to settle a score.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle against the Decepticons, who have returned stronger than ever with a plan to destroy our world.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons' all-consuming evil.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: From the Central Asian mountains to the deserts of Egypt, through the crowded streets of Paris, to beneath the ice cap of the North Pole, the elite team of operatives known as GI Joe journey on a nonstop adventure, as they use the latest in next-generation spy technology and military equipment to fight the duplicitous arms dealer Destro, and the growing threat of the mysterious Cobra organisation from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: When the crew of the Enterprise is called back home, they find an unstoppable force of terror from within their own organisation has detonated the fleet and everything it stands for, leaving our world in a state of crisis. With a personal score to settle, Captain Kirk leads a manhunt to a war zone world to capture a one man weapon of mass destruction. As our heroes are propelled into an epic chess game of life and death, love will be challenged, friendships will be torn apart, and sacrifices must be made for the only family Kirk has left: his crew.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with a young crew's maiden voyage on board the most advanced starship ever created: the USS Enterprise. In the midst of an incredible journey full of optimism, intrigue, comedy and cosmic peril, the new recruits must find a way to stop an evil being whose mission of vengeance threatens all of mankind. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Based on the Valiant Comics series, Bloodshot, an ex-killer for the mob and slain soldier, is re-animated with superpowers.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin of Loxley returns to England after years of fighting in Crusades to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all by the command of the ruthless Sheriff of Nottingham. Learning that his death has been falsely reported and his love, Marian, is involved with a local politician, Robin and co-conspirator Little John launch a covert crusade against the corruption. Robin uses his lethal archery skills to intercept tax collections destined for the Sheriff's coffers, which he turns over anonymously to Marian, now a leader of the clandestine grassroots rebellion. Discovering a larger conspiracy that threatens the stability of Europe, Robin and his men launch an attack that solidifies his status as a legendary and unstoppable rebel leader.

programme.title: Hard Kill
programme.desc: A billionaire CEO hires a team of mercenaries to protect a lethal piece of technology when his daughter is kidnapped.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Set in ancient China, a mercenary travels east in search of gunpowder and discovers the mighty Great Wall and the terrible secret behind why it was built.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Extreme athlete turned government operative Xander Cage - thought to be long dead - comes out of self-imposed exile and is set on a collision course with deadly alpha warrior Xiang and his team, in a race to recover a sinister and seemingly unstoppable weapon known as Pandora's Box. Recruiting an all-new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself enmeshed in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of world governments.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn Carnahan discover the lost city of Hamunaptra, and struggle to save the world from unspeakable evil after they inadvertently stumble upon a mummy's tomb in 1923, and the mummy is accidentally resurrected.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: Based on the character created by bestselling author Tom Clancy, Jack Ryan is a global action thriller set in the present day. This original story follows a young Jack as he uncovers a financial terrorist plot. The story follows him from 9/11, through his tour of duty in Afghanistan, which scarred him forever, and into his early days in the Financial Intelligence Unit of the modern CIA where he becomes an analyst, under the guardianship of his handler, Harper. When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to becoming a spy and must fight to save his own life and those of countless others, while also trying to protect the thing that's more important to him than anything, his relationship with his fiancee Cathy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A tanning butler is found murdered in a hotel bed next to a housewife prostitute. However, the woman claims that she was drugged and has no recollection of the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A baby girl is stolen from her mother in a crowded area in broad daylight and the investigation takes an unlikely turn when CSI discovers that the mother's husband is not the biological father.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A sadistic killer of young women strikes again, one year after the original crime. However, CSI soon discovers that the trail may lead back to the police officer who investigated the original crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating a homicide at a seedy motel, CSI discovers that Delko has been staying at the hotel and may have been the target of a shooting himself.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A reformed gang leader recently out of prison offers to help Horatio bring down his gang from the inside after it is suspected to be involved in the death of a community leader.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia is found walking the street in a daze, covered with blood from a triple homicide. But did he commit the crime or witness it?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As CSI investigates the murder of a horse owner at a racetrack in his luxury box, Horatio uncovers a plot to fix races involving an old nemesis from the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: With the help of Wolfe and an ATF agent, Horatio stages his own death as part of a plan to get Ron Saris and a shipment of fused-alloy bullets off the street.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The investigation of a badly burned corpse at a beach party leads CSI to a fuel smuggling ring with ties to human trafficking.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: How Does That Make You Kill?
programme.desc: The daughter of Delko's therapist is murdered, and a number of her mother's most troubled and ex-con patients come under suspicion.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead ultimate fighter in The Everglades leads CSI to a case involving extortion and a fight club owned by the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As the team investigates a bomb explosion that killed a 17-year-old girl in a clothing store dressing room, Horatio discovers that Julia Winston and Kyle are facing new troubles.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The only witness to a Mob-related murder is killed by a runaway crane, but Horatio is determined to make sure the killers are brought to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: New evidence proves that a man recently convicted of murder is innocent. But are his defense attorney and judge conspiring to keep him behind bars to protect the real killer?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Defense attorney Derek Powell's fiancee is killed during a yacht heist, but the investigation may be compromised when Delko's citizenship is questioned and he is threatened with deportation to Cuba.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is hanged from a gazebo during his ex-wife's divorce party, and the investigation reveals that he was leading a double life. Meanwhile, Horatio gets Kyle a job working with the medical examiner.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flight attendant is found dead after a flight in the baggage claim area, and the suspects include jealous co-workers, a drug smuggling Federal Air Marshal, and a pilot cheating on his wife.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While CSI investigates a series of burglaries, Horatio discovers that the team is being watched by Russian mobster Ivan Sarnoff.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cougar is romantically connected to three victims who were electrocuted during a beach volleyball tournament; the internal investigation into Calleigh and Delko comes to a conclusion.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the most hated man in Miami is murdered, the CSIs go on the hunt for his killer and his hidden treasure.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When several seemingly unrelated deaths turn out to be part of a sudden outbreak, CSI Woods and Delko return to help.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs recreate a night of bachelor party debauchery in order to solve a murder and find a missing groom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine calls Dr Ray Langston to come to Miami when a severed leg found in the Everglades is discovered to belong to a girl who went missing in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the scene of a fatal auto accident, but struggle to determine who was ultimately responsible and who was behind the wheel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team suspects that a company is killing its employees in order to collect on the insurance policies it put out on them. Meanwhile, a mysterious woman from Jesse's past returns.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team finds the body of a dead census report taker in the trunk of a car. The investigation takes a dangerous turn when it leads Wolfe and Boa Vista to a booby trapped meth lab.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Eric Delko returns as an expert witness for the defence, pitting himself against his old team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a woman narrowly escapes death at the hands of a serial killer, Horatio will do anything to track down the psychopath.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An exclusive hunting club where the prey is human is uncovered by the CSI after a man is killed with a bow and arrow in the Everglades.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a delivery truck driver and a housewife on his route are murdered, the team try to find their connection.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: Biopic of John Lennon's early life. Abandoned by his mother and raised by a prim and proper aunt, the rebellious teen is soon drawn to rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Nowhere Special
programme.desc: A single father dedicates the last few months of his life to finding a new family for his four-year-old son.

programme.title: Six Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: British film icon Michael Caine narrates and stars in My Generation, the vivid and inspiring story of his personal journey through 1960s London. Based on personal accounts and stunning archive footage this documentary sees Caine travel back in time to talk to The Beatles, Twiggy, David Bailey, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, David Hockney and others. The film has been painstakingly assembled over the last six years by Caine working with Producer Simon Fuller, Writers Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais and Director David Batty to tell the story of the birth of pop culture in London, through the eyes of the young Michael Caine: "For the first time in history the young working class stood up for ourselves and said, were here, this is our society and we're not going away!"

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric, grief-stricken mourners. The death of Daniel and Robert's father brings their entire dysfunctional family together to mourn his passing. When a man shows up at the funeral threatening to reveal the deceased man's shocking secret unless he gets some cash, the two brothers are forced to figure out a way to deal with the blackmailer. As they pull out every stop to try and prevent any news from spreading to the guests, the ceremony turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: The story of a fearless warrior and inspiring leader brought low by ambition and desire. A thrilling interpretation of the dramatic realities of the times and a truthful re-imagining of what wartime must have really been like for one of Shakespeare's most famous and compelling characters, a story of all-consuming passion and ambition set in war-torn 11th century Scotland.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: Biopic of John Lennon's early life. Abandoned by his mother and raised by a prim and proper aunt, the rebellious teen is soon drawn to rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Comes a Bright Day
programme.desc: Love blooms in the most unusual circumstances when a bellboy and a beautiful shopgirl are taken hostage in a jewel store heist.

programme.title: Nowhere Special
programme.desc: A single father dedicates the last few months of his life to finding a new family for his four-year-old son.

programme.title: Six Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: My Generation

The film has been painstakingly assembled over the last six years by Caine working with Producer Simon Fuller, Writers Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais and Director David Batty to tell the story of the birth of pop culture in London, through the eyes of the young Michael Caine: "For the first time in history the young working class stood up for ourselves and said, were here, this is our society and we're not going away!"

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: The story of a fearless warrior and inspiring leader brought low by ambition and desire. A thrilling interpretation of the dramatic realities of the times and a truthful re-imagining of what wartime must have really been like for one of Shakespeare's most famous and compelling characters, a story of all-consuming passion and ambition set in war-torn 11th century Scotland.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady is a surprising and intimate portrait of the late Margaret Thatcher, the first and only female Prime Minister of The United Kingdom. One of the 20th century's most famous and influential women, Thatcher came from nowhere to smash through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male dominated world.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: A powerful drama about women who were willing to lose everything in their fight for equality in early 20th-century Britain. The stirring story centres on Maud, a working wife and mother whose life is forever changed when she is secretly recruited to join the UK's growing suffragette movement. Galvanised by the outlaw fugitive Emmeline Pankhurst, Maud becomes an activist for the cause alongside women from all walks of life. When the increasingly aggressive police action forces Maud and her dedicated fellow suffragettes underground, they engage in a dangerous game of cat and mouse with the authorities, who are shocked as the women's civil disobedience escalates and sparks debate across the nation.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, hit men Ray and Ken are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges, Belgium. They don't make good tourists, however, and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances as they navigate the seemingly fairytale city.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s but are intent on keeping up the hedonistic lifestyle they've become accustomed to. Utterly confident and fearless, the two friends cut a swathe through Dublin, never letting a responsibility get in the way of a good time. When Laura falls in love with the handsome, and extremely disciplined, classical pianist Jim, she begins to question her choices, placing strain on the tight bond with Tyler.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a solitary, cultured man whose reluctance to engage with others, especially women, is matched only by the dogged obsessiveness with which he practices his profession of antiques dealer. He's never been close to another human being, not even Robert, his only friend - a young, skilful restorer of mechanical devices from every era. The day he turns 63, Virgil receives a phone call from a young woman who asks him to handle the disposal of some family works of art. But when the time comes for his first site visit, the girl fails to appear, nor, for various reasons, is she present for the taking of the inventory or for the transportation and restoration of the pieces. More than once Virgil is tempted to bow out of what appears to be nothing but a bothersome mess, but on each occasion, the mysterious young woman, locked in her own obsessive world, convinces him to continue. And with this, the old antique dealer's life begins to take an unexpected turn. It is Robert who shows him, step-by-step, how to win the heart of a young woman who is afraid of the world and, caught in the middle of this puzzling game of chess, Virgil soon finds himself enveloped by a passion that will transform his grey existence forever.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: Brooklyn tells the profoundly moving story of Eilis Lacey, a young Irish immigrant navigating her way through 1950s Brooklyn. Lured by the promise of America, Eilis departs Ireland and the comfort of her mother's home for the shores of New York City. The initial shackles of homesickness quickly diminish as a fresh romance sweeps Eilis into the intoxicating charm of love. But soon, her new vivacity is disrupted by her past, and Eilis must choose between two countries and the lives that exist within.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Adapted from Flaubert's classic novel, this film tells the tragic story of Emma, a young beauty who impulsively marries a small-town doctor to leave her father's pig farm behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy mate and seeks excitement and status outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: A powerful drama about women who were willing to lose everything in their fight for equality in early 20th-century Britain. The stirring story centres on Maud, a working wife and mother whose life is forever changed when she is secretly recruited to join the UK's growing suffragette movement. When the increasingly aggressive police action forces Maud and her dedicated fellow suffragettes underground, they engage in a dangerous game of cat and mouse with the authorities, who are shocked as the women's civil disobedience escalates and sparks debate across the nation.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy mate and seeks excitement and status outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: English born Joan Stanley, a Soviet and communist party sympathizer, becomes employed as a British government civil servant, and gets recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s. She successfully transfers nuclear bomb secrets to the Soviet Union (Russia), which enables them to keep up with the west in the development of atomic weapons, and remains undetected as a spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: An inspiration film that explores the brilliance of a mathematician that many believed could decipher the very fabric of the universe - possibly existence itself.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: On an annual extreme outdoor adventure, six women meet in a remote part of the Appalachians to explore a cave hidden deep in the woods. Far below the surface of the earth, disaster strikes when a rock fall blocks their exit and there's no way out. The women push on, praying for another exit, but there is something else lurking under the earth. The friends are now prey, forced to unleash their most primal instincts in an all-out war against an unspeakable horror - one that attacks without warning, again and again and again.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric, grief-stricken mourners. programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: A gang of tough inner-city kids try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures, turning a South London apartment complex into an extraterrestrial war zone.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: An alien touring the galaxy breaks away from her group and meets two young inhabitants of the most dangerous place in the universe: the London suburb of Croydon.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: James Murray begins compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid 19th century, receiving over 10,000 entries from an asylum patient.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric, grief-stricken mourners. The death of Daniel and Robert's father brings their entire dysfunctional family together to mourn his passing. When a man shows up at the funeral threatening to reveal the deceased man's shocking secret unless he gets some cash, the two brothers are forced to figure out a way to deal with the blackmailer. As they pull out every stop to try and prevent any news from spreading to the guests, the ceremony turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: An alien touring the galaxy breaks away from her group and meets two young inhabitants of the most dangerous place in the universe: the London suburb of Croydon.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: James Murray begins compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid 19th century, receiving over 10,000 entries from an asylum patient.

programme.title: Starter For 10
programme.desc: Brian Jackson is a wide-eyed working class kid whose exhaustive grasp of general knowledge leaves him wanting when it comes to women. On his way to achieving his long held ambition to appear on University Challenge, he falls in love with fellow student and team-mate Alice; has his conscience pricked by rights activist Rebecca; all while trying not to become the student keeno that his hometown mates think he'll turn into.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi are taking their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their extended family. But as the inevitable feuds kick in, a completely unexpected turn of events involving the children causes further tensions to rise to the surface. And with the repercussions that ensue - hilarious and emotional in equal measure - the family are forced to put aside their differences and work together or else risk losing what they hold most dear.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: For his directorial debut, Andy Serkis brings to life the inspiring true love story between Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease. When Robin is struck down by polio at the age of 28, he is confined to a hospital bed and given only a few months to live. With the help of Diana's twin brothers and the ground-breaking ideas of inventor Teddy Hall, Robin and Diana dare to escape the hospital ward to seek out a full and passionate life together - raising their young son, traveling and devoting their lives to helping other polio patients.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: A different twist on the world's most famous detective. 1947, an ageing Sherlock Holmes returns from a journey to Japan, where, in search of a rare plant with powerful restorative qualities, he has witnessed the devastation of nuclear warfare. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind, Holmes comes to rely upon his housekeeper's boy as he revisits the circumstances of the unsolved case that forced him into retirement, and searches for answers to the mysteries of life and love before it's too late.

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: The tale of the Polish pilot who alongside his comrades of the Polish Air Force joins the British Royal Air Force to fight during the Battle of Britain. Having seen Warsaw burn, Poland crumble and France capitulate, the Poles join the Brits to push back the rampant Nazi empire.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: This BAFTA-winning raw drama stars Katie Jarvis in her debut role as Mia, a volatile 15-year-old, who is always in trouble as she has been excluded from school and is ostracised by her friends. When her mother (Kierston Wareing) brings home Connor (Michael Fassbender), a mysterious stranger, a change to their lives looks promising. Trivia: Katie Jarvis lives on an Essex housing estate like the one in the movie, and she was discovered by director Andrea Arnold while in a shouting match with her boyfriend at the Tilbury train station, which is seen in the movie. Now 18, she gave birth to a daughter conceived when she was 16.

programme.title: Starter For 10

On his way to achieving his long held ambition to appear on University Challenge, he falls in love with fellow student and team-mate Alice; has his conscience pricked by rights activist Rebecca; all while trying not to become the student keeno that his hometown mates think he'll turn into.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope. A German offensive is imminent, and the officers and their cook distract themselves in their dugout with talk of food and their past lives. Stanhope, meanwhile, soaks his fear in whisky, unable to deal with his dread of the inevitable. A young new officer, Raleigh, has just arrived, fresh out of training and abuzz with the excitement of his first real posting - not least because he is to serve under Stanhope, his former school house monitor and the object of his sister's affections. Each man is trapped, the days ticking by, the tension rising and the attack drawing ever closer.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: A different twist on the world's most famous detective. 1947, an ageing Sherlock Holmes returns from a journey to Japan, where, in search of a rare plant with powerful restorative qualities, he has witnessed the devastation of nuclear warfare. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind, Holmes comes to rely upon his housekeeper's boy as he revisits the circumstances of the unsolved case that forced him into retirement, and searches for answers to the mysteries of life and love before it's too late.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Stranded 205,000 miles from Earth in a crippled spacecraft, astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert fight a desperate battle to survive. Meanwhile, at Mission Control, astronaut Ken Mattingly, flight director Gene Kranz and a heroic ground crew race against time - and the odds - to bring them home.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a handful of days an enormous commit would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway in this exciting sci-fi action. Oceans will rise, cities will fall and hope will survive. DEEP IMPACT makes its effect felt in a big and unforgettable way.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A new, technologically superior Soviet nuclear sub, the Red October, is heading for the US coast under the command of Captain Marko Ramius. The American government thinks Ramius is planning to attack. A lone CIA analyst has a different idea: he thinks Ramius is planning to defect, but he has only a few hours to find him and prove it - because the entire Russian naval and air commands are trying to find him, too. The hunt is on.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests a vagrant hitchhiker, little does he know that he has set in motion a catastrophic series of events. The vagrant in question is in fact John Rambo. Rambo makes a daring escape from the small town jail to the shelter of the mountains and prepares himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An ambitious genetic experiment takes the wrong turn when two twins - who look nothing alike - are born and then separated. Years later, the unlikely siblings meet: Julius, a highly educated but sheltered giant with a big heart, and Vincent, a pint-sized hustler with an insatiable lust for women and money. With girlfriends in tow and a hitman on their tail, the new-found brothers set off on a wild, cross-country misadventure to find their mother - but end up finding out more about themselves.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: An epic tale, set in the Rocky Mountains of Montana in the early 1900s, of three brothers and their father living in the remote wilderness and how their lives are affected by love, betrayal and brotherhood. After being discharged, Colonel Ludlow decides to raise his three sons in the wilds of Montana, where they can grow up away from the government and society he has learned to despise. As the brothers set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threatens to tear apart their once indestructible bond when Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: When Rachel Phelps becomes the owner of the Cleveland Indians following the death of her husband, she decides she would much rather live in Miami, where the weather is better and she can get a better stadium deal. But can she get this team of athletic misfits to take a dive so she can move the franchise? With a team like this, anything can happen - and probably will.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces. Unaccustomed to suburban life, fun-loving Uncle Buck soon charms his younger relatives Miles and Maizy with his hefty cooking and his new way of doing the laundry. His carefree style does not impress everyone though, especially his rebellious teenage niece, Tia, and his impatient girlfriend, Chanice. With a little bit of luck and a lot of love, Uncle Buck manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An ambitious genetic experiment takes the wrong turn when two twins - who look nothing alike - are born and then separated. His carefree style does not impress everyone though, especially his rebellious teenage niece, Tia, and his impatient girlfriend, Chanice. With a little bit of luck and a lot of love, Uncle Buck manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Two country handymen who lead a cast of zany characters to safety in this exciting sci-fi creature adventure. Just as Val McKee and Earl Basset decide to leave Perfection, Nevada, strange rumblings prevent their departure. With the help of a shapely seismology student, they discover their desolate town is infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground. The race is on to overcome these slimy subterraneans and find a way to higher ground.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A hilarious saga of a cop, a crook and a beautiful friendship gone sour. Once inseparable pals, Archie Moses and Rock Keats find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. In fact, the only person who hates them more than they hate each other is ruthless drug kingpin Frank Colton, who wants to put them both six feet under! Now, through a strange twist of fate, Moses and Keats are on the run - together. With a little luck, the bungling boys just might get out of this one alive ... if they don't kill each other first!

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: A hugely entertaining thriller that crackles with electricity and suspense. Wealthy banker Nicholas Van Orton is given a surprise birthday present by his younger brother: a gift certificate for something called 'The Game'. Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A new, technologically superior Soviet nuclear sub, the Red October, is heading for the US coast under the command of Captain Marko Ramius. The American government thinks Ramius is planning to attack. A lone CIA analyst has a different idea: he thinks Ramius is planning to defect, but he has only a few hours to find him and prove it - because the entire Russian naval and air commands are trying to find him, too. The hunt is on.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.
